games.explanation: WSN is getting plus-money at +130 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Miles Mikolas keeps WSN competitive on the mound against Robbie Ray.
NYY is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Ryan Weathers toes the rubber against Cole Ragans. Cold temps suppress the bats.
STL is getting plus-money at +125 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Matthew Liberatore keeps STL competitive on the mound against Mike Burrows. STL holds a commanding 197-point Elo edge.
CHC is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Javier Assad toes the rubber against David Peterson. Cold temps suppress the bats.

Athletics is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Jeffrey Springs is a big pitching edge over Noah Schultz. Athletics holds a commanding 143-point Elo edge.
ARI is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Ryne Nelson toes the rubber against Kevin Gausman. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.

ATL is getting plus-money at +104 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Grant Holmes keeps ATL competitive on the mound against Andrew Painter. The sim projects ATL to plate 5.4 runs — expect some fireworks.
